segments.text: The word of the LORD came again unto me, saying,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Son of man, there were two women, the daughters of one mother:
And they committed whoredoms in Egypt; they committed whoredoms in their youth: there were their breasts pressed, and there they bruised the teats of their virginity.
And the names of them were Aholah the elder, and Aholibah her sister: and they were mine, and they bare sons and daughters. Thus were their names; Samaria is Aholah, and Jerusalem Aholibah.

footnotes: Aholah: that is, His tent, or, tabernacle
Aholibah: that is, My tabernacle in her

segments.text: And Aholah played the harlot when she was mine; and she doted on her lovers, on the Assyrians her neighbours,
Behold, I will raise up thy lovers against thee, from whom thy mind is alienated, and I will bring them against thee on every side;
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: Son of man, wilt thou judge Aholah and Aholibah? yea, declare unto them their abominations;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And the righteous men, they shall judge them after the manner of adulteresses, and after the manner of women that shed blood; because they are adulteresses, and blood is in their hands.
And they shall recompense your lewdness upon you, and ye shall bear the sins of your idols: and ye shall know that I am the Lord GOD.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD
